items: Notification of Remote Participation (AB 2449 / Gov. Code § 54953)
Public Hearing Regarding Proposed Education Parcel Tax on June 2, 2026 Election
Adoption of Resolution No. 21 Calling An Election, Establishing Specifications Of The Election Order, And Requesting Consolidation With Other Elections Occurring On June 2, 2026
